polygon.style: stroke: rgb(0,0,0); stroke-width: 8; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: url(#SVGID_75); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

line.style: stroke: rgb(0,0,0); stroke-width: 2; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(0,0,0); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

path.style: stroke: rgb(0,0,0); stroke-width: 8; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 10; fill: rgb(254,159,255); fill-rule: evenodd; opacity: 1;
